query:
SELECT s.id as session_id, u.name, u.role 
FROM app_sessions s 
JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id 
WHERE u.role = 'admin'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1;
